dense_en: A man with short dark hair, glasses, and a regular build, wearing a black short sleeve graphic T-shirt with a large light colored print across the upper chest. He has light gray knee length cargo shorts with a side cargo pocket on the thigh, a dark wristwatch on one wrist, and carries a dark rectangular item by hand. He wears short white ankle socks and black athletic shoes with a light base and distinct white stripe detailing.

A man with a regular build and short dark hair parted to the side, wearing an olive green short sleeve polo shirt with a fold down collar and a short placket opening at the neckline. The shirt is tucked neatly into khaki trousers, which have front slash pockets and a full length straight fall to the shoes, secured with a dark belt at the waist. He also wears a round faced wristwatch on his left wrist and dark brown shoes.

A slim man with short dark hair wears a light gray short sleeve button up shirt with a pointed fold down collar and a full front placket of buttons. The shirt is untucked with a rounded hem, a longer curved back tail, and a back yoke seam across the upper back. He pairs it with light blue loose fit jeans and light colored footwear.

A man with short dark hair and a regular build, wearing a light gray long sleeve button up collared shirt with a fold down collar and cuffed sleeves. The shirt is worn untucked, with a curved hem that extends below the hips, and he pairs it with dark straight leg trousers and dark shoes. His clothing reads as plain and neat, with the light gray shirt and dark pants creating a simple high contrast outfit.

A man with short closely cropped dark hair, an oval to slightly round face, and rectangular dark framed glasses, with a regular build. He carries a large black backpack with broad shoulder straps and also carries a white plastic shopping bag. He is also associated with a black rectangular brief bag. His footwear is athletic shoes with white uppers, dark detailing, and white soles.

A slim young man with medium skin tone, short dark hair, and noticeable sideburns wears a plain white short sleeve crew neck T-shirt with a loose straight hem that extends below the waist. He has bright red loose knee length shorts with wide leg openings, leaving his lower legs exposed, along with light colored ankle socks and dark athletic shoes with white soles and black and white color blocking. He also carries a black backpack worn on his back. A small dark vertical print high on the chest and a dark wrist accessory are plausible but not fully certain.

A slim man with short dark hair and rectangular eyeglasses wears a dark plaid long sleeve button up shirt with a front button placket, the sleeves rolled to the forearms and the hem hanging slightly loose below the waist. A dark T-shirt is layered underneath the shirt. He pairs it with blue jeans and dark shoes with light colored soles, and he carries a white plastic shopping bag in one hand.

A man with a regular build, medium length dark hair parted to the side and reaching around the ears, wears rectangular dark framed glasses. A light colored crossbody strap runs diagonally from his left shoulder to his right hip, standing out clearly against the shirt.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair worn loose past her shoulders, dressed in a light gray long sleeve top and dark gray slim fit pants. She carries a large bright red to pink shoulder tote with a single dark shoulder strap; the bag is soft and unstructured with a wide rectangular body and hangs prominently at her side. Her footwear is dark, specifically black flat shoes, with light colored accents at the toe and sole.

A man with short dark close cropped hair and a regular build wears a bright orange crew neck short sleeve T-shirt with a large centered white block text graphic on the chest, dark pants, a dark backpack with black shoulder straps, and a dark wristwatch, with dark athletic shoes featuring white soles and warm toned accents.

A slim man with short dark side swept hair, an oval face, and eyeglasses wears a dark short sleeve collared polo shirt with a short placket and loose muted green straight leg pants. He carries a black backpack with shoulder straps on both shoulders and a light side panel, holds a smartphone in hand and wears a wristwatch on his left wrist, and has dark sneakers with light soles.

A slim man with a slim narrow face and short straight dark hair parted to the side with a slightly more volume on top, wearing a light gray hooded cardigan open over a dark crew neck shirt and dark straight leg pants, carrying a small cup and a light canvas shoulder tote bag with a dark strap, with light casual shoes.

A balding man with short dark hair around the sides and a clean shaven face, with a slim to regular build. He wears a light short sleeve collared button up shirt with a pointed fold down collar, a full front button placket, and a left chest pocket holding a dark pen clipped at the pocket edge. The shirt is tucked neatly into plain dark straight leg full length slacks, secured with a dark belt at the waist, and he wears dark shoes.

A slim woman with dark hair tied back in a low ponytail wears rectangular eyeglasses, a light short sleeve collared buttoned shirt, and dark straight leg pants. The shirt has a regular folded collar, a front button placket, and a rounded hem that extends below the waist. It looks mostly plain overall but carries a subtle small all over print rather than any large graphic marking. She pairs it with light gray athletic sneakers finished with bright red orange laces and distinct pink heel accents.

A man with short dark hair, rectangular eyeglasses, and a regular build, wearing a light colored short sleeve polo shirt with a fold down collar and a short button placket at the neckline. The polo is worn untucked with a straight hem, and it has a small dark logo on the left chest. He pairs it with dark straight leg trousers and dark shoes.

A man with short dark hair, dark rectangular eyewear, and a regular build. He is shown in two compatible outfits from this group: one is a black and yellow horizontally striped polo shirt with a dark folded collar, a short button placket at the neckline, and short sleeves finished with dark cuffs, paired with gray straight leg pants and light colored athletic shoes; the other is a plain black short sleeve T-shirt paired with dark knee length shorts and brown sandals. The striped shirt and its collar, placket, cuffed sleeves, and strong horizontal stripe layout are especially distinctive.

A slim man with short dark hair showing some gray and rectangular eyeglasses wears a muted purple long sleeve buttoned shirt with a pointed collar and chest pocket, tucked into black straight leg trousers with a black belt, with dark dress shoes and a flat dark rectangular item carried in one hand; a small dark item is attached near the right rear waistband area.

A slim young man with short dark hair and glasses wears a white crew neck short sleeve graphic T-shirt featuring a large orange red and black chest graphic. He has on light khaki loose cargo pants with a distinct flap cargo pocket on the thigh, white athletic shoes, and a black wristwatch on his left wrist. He carries a large black backpack with broad, wide shoulder straps that sits high on his back. A black shoulder bag with a long strap also appears at the side.

A stocky man with a slightly rounded midsection and short dark hair styled with a bit more volume on top, wearing a light gray short sleeve button up shirt. The shirt has a pointed fold down collar, a front button placket, a single left chest pocket, and an untucked hem. He pairs it with dark straight leg trousers and dark shoes.

A slim young man with short dark hair and glasses wears a bright yellow short sleeve polo shirt with a fold down collar, a short button placket, and a small dark logo on the left chest, paired with gray straight leg pants and black shoes. He carries a dark shoulder bag with a wide strap at the hip and wears a dark wristwatch on his left wrist.

A man with short dark hair and dark rectangular glasses, wearing a pink short sleeve polo shirt with a polo collar, a short button placket, and plain sleeve hems. The shirt hangs loosely and runs slightly long, extending below the hips. He has a regular build and wears dark loose pants with a wide straight leg cut, paired with dark shoes that have lighter colored soles.

A tall slim man with medium length dark wavy hair, wearing a dark overall outfit built around a dark plaid button up shirt with a fold down collar. The shirt is longline, with the hem extending below the waist, and the long sleeves are rolled to the forearms below the elbows. He wears dark straight leg trousers and dark shoes with a light colored edge around the sole, and he is shown with a natural walking stride.

A slightly tall, slim man with short dark hair and eyeglasses wears a very light long sleeve dress shirt with a pointed collar, a buttoned front, and button cuffs, tucked into dark straight leg tailored trousers with a dark belt, along with a left wristwatch and dark dress shoes.

A young man with short dark hair, visible ears, and a slim build wears a short sleeve crew neck T-shirt with narrow horizontal stripes, dark knee length shorts, and white athletic shoes with dark detailing. His lower legs are exposed. He carries a large light colored drawstring backpack slung over one shoulder, hanging broadly across his back like a soft sack.

A young man with a slim build and short dark hair styled with a side part and a slightly forward falling fringe. His facial details are indistinct. He wears a dark short sleeve polo shirt in a muted blue gray tone that can read as dark gray to muted blue green depending on the lighting. The polo has a soft fold down collar, a short placket opening at the neckline, and a small light colored logo on the left chest. The shirt fits loosely and is worn untucked, extending below the waist. He pairs it with dark straight leg slim pants and dark shoes, giving him a dark overall outfit with a top and pants combination.

A young woman with dark hair tied back, wears eyeglasses, and a slim build. She wears a dark open outerwear over a light scoop neck top and light colored flat shoes. She also carries a large dark shoulder bag.

A slim young man with short dark hair, dressed almost entirely in dark colors. He wears a dark short sleeve T-shirt with a red and white graphic across the chest, dark long pants, and dark shoes. He carries a black backpack with shoulder straps, and the backpack has dangling straps, including a loose strap hanging down on the left side. Near the upper back of the T-shirt there is a small rectangular patch label positioned just below the neckline area. A light colored wrist accessory is also present on his left wrist.

A slim woman with side swept bangs and dark hair tied back, wearing a bright blue short sleeve top with a hooded collar and deep V zip front opening, a wide white belt with a rectangular buckle, dark straight leg pants, and dark shoes, and carrying a small dark rectangular pouch in one hand.

A slim man with short dark hair and dark framed glasses wears a loose light gray short sleeve crew neck T-shirt with a small dark graphic on the left chest, the hem hanging slightly below the waist. He carries a mustard yellow soft unstructured backpack on both shoulders. He also wears brown straight leg pants and black athletic shoes with white midsoles.

A slim man with short dark hair and white rectangular glasses wears a dark backpack with black shoulder straps, a light short sleeve white T-shirt, and a light beige sleeveless zip vest left open. The vest has dark piping tracing the open collar and front edges, a small dark emblem on the left chest, and a pair of dark metal eyelet details near the lower front. He also wears loose straight leg light blue to blue green jeans and light colored sneakers.

A young man with short dark hair, a slim build, and tall appearance. He wears a dark short sleeve crew neck T-shirt with a large rectangular front text graphic and a black backpack with broad shoulder straps, loose straight cut black pants, and dark athletic shoes with white accents. He also carries a black backpack with a small bright green side accent.

A slim man with short dark hair and glasses wears a dark purple short sleeve polo shirt with dark long pants. He carries a large dark backpack with brown panels, black shoulder straps, a pocket area on the wearer’s right side, and light colored loop details near the top, and he is holding a phone. He wears brown shoes with light colored soles.

A slim man with short dark hair and glasses wears a light gray long sleeve hooded zip jacket with a front zipper closure, front hand pockets, and red stripe detailing running down the sleeves from shoulder to cuff. The jacket also has a small red emblem on the left chest. He carries a black crossbody shoulder bag with a wide strap worn diagonally across the chest, paired with dark knee length shorts and dark slide sandals, leaving his lower legs exposed.

A slim woman with dark shoulder length hair wears a light toned monochrome outfit built around a loose light gray short sleeve T-shirt and matching light gray cropped pants ending above the ankles. The T-shirt has a plain front, dropped shoulders, and a relaxed oversized cut. She carries a large wide light gray crossbody shoulder bag, with the wide strap worn diagonally across the torso and the bag body hanging at the hip. She finishes the outfit with flat open sandals.

A woman with short dark hair and a regular build wears a light short sleeve T-shirt with a dark chest graphic, loose straight leg black pants, and tan shoes. She carries a medium rectangular tan crossbody messenger bag with a flap front at the left hip on a wide dark shoulder strap, with multiple front zip compartments and small metal hardware details.

A slim woman with short dark hair, wearing a black short sleeve T-shirt over a white long sleeve inner layer. She wears slim black pants and dark shoes, and carries a purple crossbody bag across the front torso together with a black backpack with shoulder straps on her back.

A light skinned man with short light blond gray hair and a regular build wears a light gray short sleeve polo shirt with a soft fold down collar, a short placket opening at the neck, and a loose straight hem. He has on dark long pants with a relaxed straight leg fit and dark open toe sandals. He carries a white plastic shopping bag in one hand.

A slim young man with short dark hair wears a dark hooded sweatshirt with the hood resting on his upper back. The top hangs loosely with a draped shape and wide sleeves, and it has a small light colored graphic patch near the lower side. He carries a large black backpack with a rounded top, thin shoulder straps, and light piping outlining the rear outer zip compartment. He also wears dark knee length shorts that leave his lower legs exposed, along with orange flip flops.

A slim woman with a narrow oval face and dark hair tied back, wearing a dark jacket over a light collared shirt with the collar showing above the neckline, dark straight leg trousers, and light shoes. She carries a dark rectangular item with a light edge in both hands, with a mauve cloth draped over one forearm.

A slim woman with short dark hair tied back, wearing a light gray short sleeve T-shirt with a wide scoop neckline and a faint front graphic print spread across the chest and torso. She carries a blue shoulder bag with a dark shoulder strap, and pairs the top with a dark knee length skirt and light colored sneakers. With the tied back hair, chest graphic, scoop neck, blue shoulder bag, and dark skirt forming the clearest identifying combination.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair worn loose past the shoulders and cut with bangs, wearing dark framed glasses. She wears dark straight leg pants and bright pink athletic shoes with light colored soles, and carries a black backpack with light trim over both shoulders.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair worn down past the shoulders and dark framed glasses. She wears a light gray short sleeve V neck T-shirt with a subtle all over pattern of small dark dots and a slightly loose draped fit, paired with black slim cut long pants. She carries a large bright orange backpack with black shoulder straps, and the backpack has a soft slouchy sack shape. Her footwear is dark sneakers with white toe caps and white midsoles.

A slim man with short dark hair and dark framed glasses wears a dark overall outfit built around a black crew neck T-shirt with short, slightly loose sleeves and a loose fit, paired with dark gray straight leg pants. He carries a black shoulder bag as a crossbody on the left shoulder, with a wide strap running across the upper torso and the bag resting at the left hip. He also wears a light colored wristwatch and dark shoes with light colored midsoles. His build reads between slim and regular, and the outfit is plain and uncluttered.

A man with short gray hair and dark rectangular glasses, with a slim to regular build, wears a black short sleeve polo shirt that exposes his forearms. The shirt has a small white logo on the left chest and three white parallel stripes running along the shoulders and sleeves. He pairs it with light gray straight leg trousers with side hand pockets and dark shoes. He also carries a black crossbody bag resting at the hip and a white rectangular item tucked under one arm.

A slim woman with dark hair tied back in a low ponytail wears a black and white checkered tunic length top with a flared hem falling below the hips, paired with black pants. She carries a large dark backpack and a thin light shoulder strap crosses diagonally over her body. She wears light colored shoes with white soles, and the neckline is framed by a broad dark detail.

An older man with short gray hair and a balding crown, a slim build, and light skin wears a light collared buttoned shirt with a front button line and a left chest pocket, tucked into dark high waisted straight leg dress slacks with a dark belt, finished with dark shoes.

A slim man with short dark hair wears a light gray short sleeve T-shirt with a plain straight hem and a simple crew neck shape, paired with dark straight leg pants whose cuffs are rolled up above the ankles. The outfit has a clear light top and dark pants contrast. He wears dark shoes with light socks showing above them, carries a small light colored handheld item, and holds his arms crossed in front while walking. The clothing is simple and plain, with the turned up pant cuffs standing out as the clearest structural detail.

A slim woman with dark hair tied back in a low ponytail wears a dark long sleeve top, light blue jeans, and dark sneakers with light colored soles. She carries a medium backpack on both shoulders. The backpack is predominantly dark purple with black side panels, has a rounded top and a vertically elongated shape, includes dangling side straps, and features a large light gray diamond shaped panel on the lower back, making the bag the part that stands out of her appearance.

A slim man with short dark hair that has a little more volume on top, wearing a light blue to gray blue long sleeve collared button up shirt with a full front button placket. The shirt is worn untucked with a straight lower hem, paired with dark straight leg trousers. He carries a large black shoulder bag on one shoulder with a broad dark strap and wears a dark wristwatch on one wrist. His footwear is light colored soled sneakers.

A slim young man with short dark hair and dark framed glasses wears a mask, a plain teal short sleeve T-shirt with no large graphic, and dark knee length shorts with a straight, loose fit that leave his lower legs exposed. He carries a backpack and wears light athletic sneakers, including white sneakers with darker accents and thick light midsoles.

A slim young man with short dark hair, wearing a light gray plain crew neck short sleeve T-shirt. The T-shirt has a slightly loose straight fit and falls below the waist. He wears dark long pants with a simple straight leg cut, paired with athletic shoes that have dark uppers and thick light colored midsoles, giving the shoes a dark and light contrast at the sole.

A stocky man with short dark hair and glasses wears a loose dark short sleeve T-shirt with a small white logo on the left chest, cut long with a straight hem that falls well below the waist, paired with dark knee length shorts that leave the lower legs exposed and dark slip on sandals.

A slim woman with long dark side parted hair worn loose past the shoulders carries a large tan shoulder tote bag on one shoulder. She wears a gray long sleeve cardigan left open over a light blouse with vertical ruffle pleats down the front and a narrow dark neck tie, paired with black slim pants and light beige shoes, with a bright pink wrist band and a small light detail near the waistband.

A slim woman with long dark hair worn loose wears a black short sleeve top with light gray short bottoms over black fitted legwear. She carries a large black and white striped shoulder tote bag on her right shoulder at the hip, with a light colored strap and a bold wide vertical stripe pattern that bends slightly diagonally where the bag folds. She holds a phone in one hand and wears dark shoes with light colored midsoles, with a small warm colored wrist accessory on one wrist.

A slim man with short dark hair, dressed predominantly in dark colors, wears a black short sleeve T-shirt with dark straight leg pants and dark athletic shoes with light colored soles. He carries a large backpack on both shoulder straps, with black straps, a black top section, red side panels, and a tall wide vertical light gray center panel that stands out strongly against the otherwise dark outfit.

A slim woman with dark medium length hair tied back in a low side ponytail and side swept bangs wears an oversized loose black short sleeve T-shirt and light blue denim shorts. The shirt has a large front chest graphic with a white and red text block reading "NEW YORK, " with a large outlined number "33" centered below it. She carries a dark shoulder bag on one side and wears a thin wrist accessory on one wrist, and has bright yellow green athletic shoes.

A slim man with short dark hair wears dark sunglasses and a loose blue short sleeve collared shirt with a front placket opening. The shirt has contrasting black side panels that continue across the back, creating a two tone blue and black layout. He pairs it with light gray knee length cargo shorts featuring large side cargo pockets with flap pocket structure, dark slip on shoes, and he holds a small phone in one hand.

A slim man with short dark hair and dark rectangular glasses wears a short sleeve collared polo shirt with a short button placket at the neckline and bold wide multicolored horizontal stripes, paired with dark straight leg trousers and brown shoes, with a white item tucked at the back waist.

A slim young man with a coarse slim face and short close cropped dark hair in a slightly rounded shape wears a bright red short sleeve polo shirt with a fold down collar and short button placket, paired with black knee length shorts and white athletic sneakers with dark side detailing. He carries a black crossbody shoulder bag with a wide strap running from his right shoulder to his left hip across the chest, and there is a small white stripe detail on the shoulder area where the strap passes. He also wears a black wristwatch and carries a light gray hooded outerwear in one hand, along with a white paper item, with bare legs and a walking stride.

A young man with short dark hair and a bleached blond top, a slim build, and bare arms wears a bright red short sleeve crew neck T-shirt with a plain red back, light gray knee length shorts, and red athletic shoes, while holding a small dark item in one hand and carrying a bright red rectangular document holder at his side; the shorts have curved dark trim around the rear pocket area.

A slim young man with short dark hair and dark rectangular glasses wears a loose crew neck mustard yellow short sleeve T-shirt. He pairs it with black straight leg athletic track pants detailed with a white side stripe, with a larger white angled panel near the lower outer leg area, and light colored sneakers.

A slim woman with a narrow oval face and long dark hair pulled back into a low ponytail, wearing a light gray short sleeve collared overshirt left open over a red top. The overshirt has flap chest pockets, and the black shorts have white drawstrings at the waistband. She carries a large light colored tote bag on one shoulder with a dense dark repeating polka dot pattern and wears a white watch on her left wrist, and has on white ankle socks with white athletic sneakers.

A slim woman with a narrow oval face and long straight dark hair worn loose past the shoulders, carrying a large black shoulder tote bag on one side and a clear plastic water bottle in her hand. She wears a light gray hooded zip jacket left open over an oversized dark graphic T-shirt with a front print and a black top underneath, paired with short dark shorts that leave her legs bare. Her footwear is black athletic shoes, including black sneakers with white midsoles, set off by bright red ankle socks.

A slim young man with short dark hair and glasses wears a loose dark raglan long sleeve shirt with sleeves pushed to about forearm length, a wide light gray shoulder yoke spanning across the upper chest, back, and both shoulders, and a small pocket on the left chest. The top hangs untucked with a straight hem and a broad crew neckline. He pairs it with light colored straight leg pants, red shoes with light colored soles, a black crossbody shoulder bag with a broad strap worn on one shoulder, and a dark wristwatch.

A slim woman with a short dark bob haircut parted to one side, wearing a bright red fitted crew neck T-shirt with a large centered heart graphic on the chest, dark slim ankle length pants, and flat pink sandals, and carrying a small dark shoulder bag at her side.

A slim young man with short dark hair wears a short sleeve polo shirt with a collar and short button placket. The shirt has color blocked construction, with a dark collar and upper chest area, white to light gray shoulder and upper sleeve panels, and a teal and black horizontally striped torso panel. He carries a large plain black backpack with shoulder straps on both shoulders. He also wears black cropped pants ending below the knee and dark shoes with light colored midsoles.

A slim young man with short dark hair wears a gray hooded zip sweatshirt with the hood down and a lighter gray hood, with a light shirt showing at the neckline and slightly below the hem. He has on dark straight leg pants and light athletic shoes with darker uppers. He carries a turquoise folder and wears a black backpack with broad shoulder straps, with a slim light vertical attachment on the right side of the backpack.

A slim woman with long dark hair worn loose past her shoulders and thin framed eyeglasses, wearing a red patterned long sleeve top over a light gray inner layer that shows at the waist hem, with black slim fit pants and white sneakers, carrying a light colored tote bag at her side and wearing a black backpack on her back; the layered gray hem at the waist stands out as a clear structural detail.

A slim woman with long dark hair worn loose to around shoulder length carries a large brown shoulder tote bag on one shoulder. The bag has a soft, slouchy shape. She wears a light yellow long sleeve top with full length sleeves and a straight hem, paired with dark slim narrow cut ankle length pants and dark shoes.

A slightly tall, slim man with short dark hair that has moderate volume wears dark rectangular eyeglasses. He is dressed in a white long sleeve dress shirt tucked into dark straight leg trousers, with a pointed collar, full buttoned cuffs, a dark necktie, and a dark vertical line running down the button front. A black belt defines the waist. He carries a light colored rectangular tote bag with two long dark handles and a large dark printed graphic on the side, along with a separate dark soft sided bag in the other hand.

A slim young man with short dark hair wears a light colored long sleeve top with a simple round crew neckline and light colored straight leg pants. He carries a black backpack with two shoulder straps, and the pack has a rounded top with a tall oval body that hangs long down his back. Dark shoes complete the outfit, with a lighter sole edge and orange red accents adding contrast near the heel and sole.

A light skinned man with very short dark hair and a slim regular build wears a bright red crew neck short sleeve T-shirt with a small white chest graphic, light khaki cargo shorts with large flap style side cargo pockets, and dark open toe sport sandals. He carries a large black backpack with wide shoulder straps that sits high on his back. The outfit is defined by the strong red shirt, the pale khaki cargo shorts with prominent pocket flaps on the sides, and the dark strapped sandals.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair past the shoulders wears a black long sleeve top with a lighter center front chest panel, dark slim fitted pants, and dark ankle boots. She carries a large bright red shoulder tote bag with a wide strap and a soft unstructured rectangular body draped at her side, creating a strong red and black outfit contrast.

A slim woman with long dark hair worn loose, with her facial details obscured, wears a black long sleeve top and dark slim lower garments. She carries a large bright red shoulder tote bag that has a wide slouchy soft body and two dark shoulder straps, creating a very prominent color block against the otherwise dark outfit. The tote also has dark trim along the top edge and small metallic stud accents near the strap attachments. She finishes the look with brown ankle boots.

A slim young man with short dark hair wears a light gray long sleeve knit top with the sleeves pushed up to the forearms under an open gray cardigan, with a dark belt at the waist, knee length light denim shorts with side hand pockets, and dark flat sandals.

A woman with a short dark bob cut around jaw length, side parted with one side tucked back, and a broad round face. She has a regular to stocky build with a slightly broad upper body and torso. She is dressed mostly in light neutral tones, wearing a light short sleeve T-shirt with a large rectangular graphic panel across the chest, an open light outerwear layer draped over her shoulders without her arms inserted into the sleeves, and light straight leg pants. She also wears a mask.

A slim young man with short dark hair in a rounded, slightly full shape and a side parted fringe. He wears a white short sleeve polo shirt with a short button placket at the neck, dark trim along the collar edge, and dark piping at the sleeve cuffs, with the shirt hanging untucked. He has khaki cropped pants with a straight, slightly relaxed cut that end above the ankles, and light flip flop sandals. He carries a light blue rectangular folder in one hand.

A slim woman with long dark hair worn loose past the shoulders wears sunglasses, a necklace pendant, and a wristwatch. She has on a light gray longline tunic top extending to the upper thigh, with three quarter sleeves, a round neckline, and a short buttoned placket at the upper chest. A black shoulder strap runs diagonally across her chest, attached to a dark backpack on her back. She pairs the tunic with bright blue fitted pants and flat sandals, and carries a light rectangular handheld item in one hand.

A man with short dark hair styled in a side part, a narrow oval face, and dark framed glasses, with a slim regular build. He also carries a black backpack with two shoulder straps and wears a dark wristwatch on one wrist.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair falling past the shoulders, dressed in an officewear outfit. She wears a light colored short sleeve fitted blouse with slightly puffed sleeves, tucked into a dark knee length pleated skirt with a softly flared lower section. She carries a large structured black rectangular handbag by its short handles at her side and wears open flat sandals.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair worn down and eyeglasses wears a dark short sleeve top with a simple upper chest placket detail and dark slim fitted pants. The strongest contrast cue is a large bright pink shoulder tote bag with a wide strap and a soft unstructured body, and she wears dark shoes with pink accents that echo the bag.

A slim woman with dark hair pulled back wears a dark overall outfit built around a black scoop neck top with a lighter trim around the neckline, layered under a dark long sleeve open outerwear piece that reads as a lightweight outerwear. She pairs it with dark slim full length pants and open toe dark flat sandals. She carries a large black shoulder bag on one shoulder, with a rounded body and short strap.

A slim young man with short dark hair that has moderate volume on top, wearing a dark long sleeve top with a collar and a small light logo on the chest. He is dressed in a dark top and dark straight leg pants, carries a dark backpack with shoulder straps on his back and wears bright green athletic shoes with lighter soles.

A slim woman with dark hair tied back in a low ponytail, wearing a plain black long sleeve top with a loose straight cut and an upper hip hem. She pairs it with gray slim fitting pants and black pointed flats. She carries a large black shoulder bag on her left side, with a broad rectangular body hanging around hip level. The outfit is simple and dark on top, with a loose outerwear like silhouette and full length sleeves.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair worn loose and indistinct facial details, dressed in a white short sleeve top and black pants. She carries a large black soft sided shoulder bag at her side with short handles and oversized white number print reading "64 32, " and wears a maroon backpack. Her footwear is bright pink athletic shoes paired with dark ankle socks.

A slim woman with side parted, shoulder length straight dark hair wears a light blue loose open outerwear piece with a plain hoodless design, sitting between a lightweight jacket and a cardigan. The outerwear hangs open over a very light colored top and has a slightly draped open front. She carries a black shoulder bag with a dark strap on one shoulder and wears black slim straight leg pants, and has dark flat shoes accented with red pink trim. She also holds a small dark rectangular item in one hand.

A slim woman with medium length dark brown hair worn down to the shoulders, styled with a side part, side swept bangs, and slight volume at the ends, wearing eyeglasses. She is dressed in a dark long tunic style top that extends to mid thigh, with long sleeves and a loose softly draped cowl neckline that gives the top a relaxed, unfitted silhouette. She pairs it with black leggings and flats. She carries a large dark shoulder tote worn crossbody, with a broad strap and a soft hanging shape. Overall she is dressed in a dark top with black lower garments.

A slim woman with long dark straight hair worn down with a side part wears a dark long sleeve top with horizontal stripes across the torso and dark cropped fitted legwear ending below the knees. She carries a large black shoulder bag with light ring hardware at the strap attachment and holds a light blue bundled garment in her arms, with dark footwear featuring light midsoles.

A slim woman with long straight dark hair worn loose past the shoulders, carrying a large black shoulder bag with a broad strap hanging at her side. She wears a white short sleeve V neck T-shirt, dark purple short shorts, and orange flat sandals, with bare legs. The outfit is simple and light, with the oversized black bag standing out strongly against the white top and dark shorts.

A slim young man with short dark hair and glasses wears a light gray raglan T-shirt with black sleeves, light khaki knee length shorts, low ankle socks, and white athletic shoes with three side stripes, and he carries a large boxy backpack with a rounded top and wide shoulder straps.

A slim woman with long dark hair worn loose past her shoulders, her face largely obscured by her hair, walks with a clear stride while holding a smartphone in one hand.
